objective_chain.description: Follow an exposed diagnostics trail to the rollback data that should not be externally reachable.
Recover and submit the production flag.

hints: The main application path is intentionally less useful in this variant.
A diagnostics surface exposes enough operational context to pivot toward the real answer.
Treat rollout and rollback data as part of the reachable attack surface.
